one_time_description: Impairment loss on two Micro Automated Gasification System (MAGS) units recognized on the consolidated statement of operations
economic_notes: First Nation operates various programs including municipal services, health services, economic development, housing, education. Holds interests in Great Lakes Hospitality Group Limited Partnership (hotel in Little Current), UCCM Building Material Supply Limited Partnership (36.5%), Your Dollar Store With More (100%), Wikwemikong Renewable Energy Limited Partnership (solar energy projects), Ontario First Nations Sovereign Wealth Limited Partnership (2.2337%), N'Swakamok Forestry Corporation. Rainbow Ridge Golf Course operated by Wikwemikong Property Management Company Limited.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 (not 2024 as template default). Province is Ontario (ON). The statement includes a large deferred contributions movement - beginning balance added to revenue and ending balance deducted. Expenses_housing combines Housing and Other Projects ($1,897,514) and Social Housing Rentals ($4,329,892). Consolidated entities include Wiikwemkoong Board of Education, Wikwemikong Development Commission, Wikwemikong Tribal Police Service, Wikwemikong Nursing Home, Wikwemikong Property Management Company Limited (Rainbow Ridge Golf Course), and FirstTEL Communications Corporation. Modified equity method entities include Your Dollar Store With More, Great Lakes Hospitality Group LP, N'Swakamok Forestry Corporation, 2228293 Ontario Limited, and UCCM Building Supply LP. Impairment loss of $1,955,106 on MAGS units. Long-term debt note was truncated in source document. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC funding only as other government transfers are embedded in 'Other revenues' without breakdown. Payable to Ontario Ministry of Health $1,868,667 and Promissory note to ISC $2,804,385 are additional liabilities beyond standard long-term debt.
